detectors.description:
Reentrancy in M31._transfer(address,address,uint256) (M31.sol#657-781):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (M31.sol#721)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (M31.sol#795-807)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (M31.sol#727)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (M31.sol#815)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (M31.sol#779)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (M31.sol#941)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (M31.sol#921)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (M31.sol#923)
	M31._rOwned (M31.sol#327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- M31._takeTeam(uint256) (M31.sol#935-943)
	- M31._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (M31.sol#895-931)
	- M31.balanceOf(address) (M31.sol#483-487)
	- M31.constructor() (M31.sol#417-447)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (M31.sol#779)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (M31.sol#949)
	M31._rTotal (M31.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- M31._getCurrentSupply() (M31.sol#1091-1101)
	- M31._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (M31.sol#947-953)
	- M31.constructor() (M31.sol#417-447)
	- M31.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (M31.sol#579-601)
